type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous estimation method used the emission factor provided by Environment Canada for Biogas Flare calculation.  After consulting with emission specialists, they have recommended an emission factor of 0.27kg/ 10^3 m3 CH4 for PM2.5, PM10 and TPM.  This emission factor was obtained from the US EPA Compilation of Air Pollutant Emissions Factors (AP-42).

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The Calgary Compost Facility located on the Shepard Campus achieved substantial completion in July 2017. The Compost Facility accept biosolids generated at the Bonnybrook Wastewater Treatment facility. The biosolids contains phosphorus that is used in the composting process and exceeds the NPRI threshold.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: Recovery of Organic Substances is the tonnage of phosphorus that originates from Biosolids that is sent to compost facility for processing.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Variable disposal total based on any number of factors which includes rate of construction/demolition within the City of Calgary.  This calculation assumes an overall average concentration of 1% by weight of asbestos wastes disposed in a dedicated cell.
